title: PerspectiveLockPlugin
description: Lock and control the player's perspective (first/third person) from the server.
body:
🇬🇧 English – Plugin Description
Perspective Lock Plugin is a powerful server-side companion to the Perspective Lock mod, allowing you to fully control and lock your players’ camera views using simple commands.

With this plugin, you can:

Instantly switch a player’s perspective (first, third-person back, front)

Lock the current camera view, preventing players from using F5 to switch

Create immersive minigames, cinematic experiences, or strict PvP modes

Integrate smoothly with any Fabric client that has the Perspective Lock mod installed

🔧 Commands:

/perspectivelock <true|false|first|back|front>
✅ Lightweight, easy to use, and designed for seamless integration between server and client.

🇪🇸 Español – Descripción del Plugin
Perspective Lock Plugin es el complemento del lado servidor para el mod Perspective Lock, que te permite controlar por completo la vista de cámara de tus jugadores mediante simples comandos.

Con este plugin podrás:

Cambiar instantáneamente la perspectiva del jugador (primera, tercera trasera, frontal)

Bloquear la vista actual, evitando que usen F5 para cambiarla

Crear minijuegos inmersivos, experiencias cinemáticas o modos PvP estrictos

Integrarse perfectamente con cualquier cliente Fabric que tenga el mod instalado

🔧 Comandos:

/perspectivelock <true|false|first|back|front>
✅ Liviano, fácil de usar y diseñado para una integración fluida entre servidor y cliente.
